name: deusvault

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run start:dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.lint-all: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.format-all: npm --prefix client run format && npm --prefix server run format
scripts.type-check-all: npm --prefix client run type-check && npm --prefix server run type-check

author: Бредихина А. С., Цехмистрова Д. А.
